layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard with generous padding (p-6, p-8) for panels
layout_and_spacing.cms_layout: Flexbox/Grid layout. Left sidebar (320px fixed) for settings with crisp 1px right border. Main area for live canvas (bg-[#F7F7F7] with a centered white preview window scaling down to fit).
layout_and_spacing.corners: rounded-none or minimal rounded-md (4px) for interactive elements (strict Swiss feel)
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px borders instead of shadows to define containers. For popovers: shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] with 1px border.

components.sidebar: Flat white background, 1px right border, dense Shadcn UI inputs for controls.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, Select, Switch, Slider. High contrast borders focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black rounded-none or small radius.
components.buttons: Flat colors. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00247D]. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F7F7F7].

storefront_preview.announcement_bar: Full width, configurable background/text color, dismissible 'X'.
storefront_preview.header: Sticky or static, includes minimal logo, centered links, right-aligned cart button.
storefront_preview.sticky_header_pill: Floating pill nav on scroll down (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-[#E5E5E5]).
storefront_preview.cart_drawer: Shadcn Sheet component, 1px left border, minimal list of items.
storefront_preview.footer: Large padding (py-24), grid columns for links, large typography for brand name.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle background color shifts on buttons/links. Never rely only on color; add an underline or 1px border change.
motion_and_interaction.canvas_update: Smooth transition on live preview when settings change.

image_urls.description: Minimal black and white logo for the storefront header
Modern wooden chair for storefront product display / cart items
Modern white chair for storefront product display

media.icons: lucide-react for all CMS dashboard icons and storefront UI icons (cart, menu, close).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 ratio. Button texts must have high contrast against background.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='cms-sidebar', data-testid='header-logo-input', data-testid='cart-toggle').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the CMS with a dual-pane layout: a left sidebar for controls and a right main area for the live storefront preview.
Use Shadcn UI for the sidebar controls (Accordions, Inputs, Switches, Color Pickers if possible).
The storefront preview should immediately reflect state changes from the sidebar.
Ensure the storefront implements an Announcement Bar, Header, Sticky Header Pill (appears on scroll), Footer, and a Cart Drawer (using Shadcn Sheet).
Maintain the strict, high-contrast 'Swiss' aesthetic: rely on 1px borders (#E5E5E5), pure black/white, and flat surfaces over heavy shadows or gradients.
DO NOT use generic fonts for headings (use Outfit imported via Google Fonts).
Use the provided image URLs for logos and mock product data in the live preview.
